prose: **Ethylene frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier 'standard' (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: pre-supplied fixed coordinates (source: /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz). SCF converged in 6 cycles. HOMO = −7.6156 eV, LUMO = −0.17987 eV → **gap ≈ 7.4357 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy). Command: `cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --multiplicity 1 ethylene.xyz`. No warnings reported.
